articles.title: MBTA announces schedule changes, detours as nearly 1 million expected to attend Sunday’s St. Patrick’s Day parade
articles.description:
“The MBTA takes great pride as we continue to improve daily service for the public to use 365 days a year and to ensure everyone can participate and enjoy special events like St. Patrick’s Day festivities," MBTA General Manager Phillip Eng said.

The post MBTA announces schedule changes, detours as nearly 1 million expected to attend Sunday’s St. Patrick’s Day parade appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: MBTA implements schedule changes for St. Patrick's Day parade on March 12.
Nearly 1 million attendees expected, affecting local transportation services.
Detours and adjustments aim to enhance public access to festivities.
